inputs.source: https://sourceforge.net/projects/exiftool/files/exiftool-13.59_64.zip/download (official exiftool SourceForge mirror; exiftool.org only serves the current release at unversioned-stable URLs)
inputs.role: entire payload content, unmodified except renaming exiftool(-k).exe -> exiftool.exe (upstream's documented install step)

docs: README.md is version-controlled here; README_upstream.txt is carried from the upstream zip.
